info.title: DotSights.CLI
info.description: Screen usage tracker with customizable options. See project repository for instructions.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: A CLI for interacting with DotSights and it's tool box. Visualize data in a table, start or stop the tracker or change configuration.

commands.name: display
commands.description: Displays data tracked by DotSights directly on the terminal

commands.name: today
commands.description: Display the total usage data tracked for today

commands.name: alltime
commands.description: Display the total usage data tracked

commands.name: week
commands.description: Display the total usage data tracked for the last 7 days

commands.name: all
commands.description: Display the total usage data tracked since the beginning, usage for today and usage for the last 7 days

commands.name: overall
commands.description: Displays overall data such as most used process, most active day of week and hours

commands.name: config
commands.description: Configuration-Related commands and options for DotSights. Some settings can only be changed by editing the config file directly. Configuration changes only apply after data save or restarting tracker.

commands.name: reset
commands.description: Resets the configuration file to default values

commands.name: wipedata
commands.description: Wipes all data tracked by DotSights

commands.name: opendata
commands.description: Opens the data folder in the file explorer

commands.name: preview
commands.description: Preview the configuration file

commands.name: regex
commands.description: Add or remove regex grouping rules

commands.name: add
commands.description: Add a new regex grouping rule

commands.name: remove
commands.description: Remove a regex grouping rule

commands.name: open
commands.description: Opens the configuration file in the default text editor

commands.name: squash
commands.description: Squash data using grouping rules

commands.name: restore
commands.description: Restore a backup file.

commands.name: backup
commands.description: Create a backup of the current data.

commands.name: tracker
commands.description: Tracker controls

commands.name: start
commands.description: Starts the tracker if it isn't already running

commands.name: stop
commands.description: Stops the tracker if it is running
